entries.signature: public static Gdk.Rectangle ToGdkRectangle (this SkiaSharp.SKRectI rect);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKRectI" /> to a <see langword="Gdk.Rectangle" />.

params.rect: The SkiaSharp integer rectangle to convert.

fields.returns: A <see langword="Gdk.Rectangle" /> with the same position and size as the source rectangle.

entries.signature: public static Gdk.RGBA ToGdkRGBA (this SkiaSharp.SKColor color);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> to a <see langword="Gdk.RGBA" />.
fields.returns: A <see langword="Gdk.RGBA" /> with component values normalised to the [0, 1] range.

entries.signature: public static Gdk.RGBA ToGdkRGBA (this SkiaSharp.SKColorF color);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" /> to a <see langword="Gdk.RGBA" />.

params.color: The SkiaSharp floating-point color to convert.

fields.returns: A <see langword="Gdk.RGBA" /> with the same floating-point component values.

entries.signature: public static Graphene.Point ToGraphenePoint (this SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPoint" /> to a <see langword="Graphene.Point" />.
fields.returns: A <see langword="Graphene.Point" /> with the same X and Y coordinates.

entries.signature: public static Graphene.Point3D ToGraphenePoint3D (this SkiaSharp.SKPoint3 point);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPoint3" /> to a <see langword="Graphene.Point3D" />.
fields.returns: A <see langword="Graphene.Point3D" /> with the same X, Y, and Z coordinates.

entries.signature: public static Graphene.Rect ToGrapheneRect (this SkiaSharp.SKRect rect);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKRect" /> to a <see langword="Graphene.Rect" />.

params.rect: The SkiaSharp floating-point rectangle to convert.

fields.returns: A <see langword="Graphene.Rect" /> with the same origin and size.

entries.signature: public static Graphene.Size ToGrapheneSize (this SkiaSharp.SKSize size);

fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKSize" /> to a <see langword="Graphene.Size" />.
fields.returns: A <see langword="Graphene.Size" /> with the same width and height.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColor ToSKColor (this Gdk.RGBA color);

fields.summary: Converts a <see langword="Gdk.RGBA" /> to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" />.

params.color: The GTK RGBA color to convert.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> with component values scaled to the [0, 255] range.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColorF ToSKColorF (this Gdk.RGBA color);

fields.summary: Converts a <see langword="Gdk.RGBA" /> to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" />.

params.color: The GTK RGBA color to convert.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" /> with the same floating-point component values.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKPoint ToSKPoint (this Graphene.Point point);

fields.summary: Converts a <see langword="Graphene.Point" /> to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPoint" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPoint" /> with the same X and Y coordinates.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKPoint3 ToSKPoint3 (this Graphene.Point3D point);

fields.summary: Converts a <see langword="Graphene.Point3D" /> to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPoint3" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPoint3" /> with the same X, Y, and Z coordinates.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKRect ToSKRect (this Graphene.Rect rect);

fields.summary: Converts a <see langword="Graphene.Rect" /> to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKRect" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKRect" /> with the same origin and size.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKSize ToSKSize (this Graphene.Size size);

fields.summary: Converts a <see langword="Graphene.Size" /> to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKSize" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKSize" /> with the same width and height.
